Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko.
About Services Speaking Events Contact

Official biography resource

Bio of Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko

I created this page to make life easier for dear event organisers, journalists, podcast hosts, collaborators, and conference teams — a practical resource for anyone who needs a clear, accurate, publication-ready bio of Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko.

Professional bio

Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko brings nearly 10 years of practical experience in applying digital technologies in agriculture, with a primary focus on computer vision and deep learning for plant phenotyping and food quality assurance.

She is co-founder and CEO of Petiole, a UK-based SME developing practical AI tools for agriculture and plant science. The global platform Petiole Pro, developed by Maryna’s team, was named a finalist in the GIST Tech-I 2015 competition in the USA, shortlisted for the UK FPC Fresh Awards 2023, and received two grants from Innovate UK — the UK government’s innovation agency — for practical AI applications in agricultural challenges such as pest and disease detection.

Maryna was recognised as an Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn in the May 2026 edition and has an active educational presence in social and business media.

She is one of 16 Community Forum Members of the 2025/26 Cohort, pre-selected by the Innovate UK Women in Innovation team. Maryna is also an Oxford Farming Conference 2026 Inspire Fellow.

Maryna is a fellow of the “Scaling Young Women’s Businesses Through IP Mentorship” programme by the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) and the International Trade Centre’s SheTrades initiative. She is Virgin StartUp Alumna 2020.

She is a regular speaker at educational events and has participated in high-level agriculture-focused meetings in the United Kingdom and internationally.

Short bio — 300 characters

Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko is co-founder and CEO of Petiole, applying computer vision and deep learning to agriculture. She is a LinkedIn Expert Top Voice, Innovate UK Women in Innovation Forum Member, and Oxford Farming Conference Inspire Fellow.

Other commonly requested bios

One-line bio

Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko is co-founder and CEO of Petiole, Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn, and an educator in practical AI for agriculture.

50-word bio

Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko is co-founder and CEO of Petiole, a UK-based agritech SME developing practical AI tools for plant science and agriculture. Recognised as an Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn, she brings nearly 10 years of experience in digital agriculture, computer vision, plant phenotyping, and AI education.

100-word bio

Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko is co-founder and CEO of Petiole, a UK-based agritech SME developing AI tools for plant science, plant phenotyping, and food quality assurance. She brings nearly 10 years of practical experience in applying digital technologies in agriculture, with a focus on computer vision and deep learning. Petiole Pro, developed by her team, was recognised as a finalist in the GIST Tech-I 2015 competition, shortlisted for the UK FPC Fresh Awards 2023, and supported by two Innovate UK grants. Maryna was recognised as an Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn in May 2026.

Speaker introduction

Our speaker today is Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko, co-founder and CEO of Petiole. Maryna brings nearly 10 years of practical experience in digital agriculture, with a focus on computer vision, deep learning, plant phenotyping, and food quality assurance. She is recognised as an Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn and is known for making AI in agriculture practical, accessible, and connected to real-world farming challenges.

Media bio

Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko is a UK-based agritech entrepreneur, educator, and speaker specialising in practical applications of artificial intelligence in agriculture. She is co-founder and CEO of Petiole, the team behind Petiole Pro, a global platform for plant measurement and agricultural image analysis. Maryna has nearly 10 years of experience in digital agriculture and has been recognised as an Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn.

First-person bio

I am Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko, co-founder and CEO of Petiole. My work focuses on practical AI for agriculture, especially computer vision and deep learning tools for plant phenotyping, plant measurement, and food quality assurance. I create educational content on AI in agriculture and work with partners to make digital tools more useful for real agricultural challenges.

Education and professional training

  • UPOV Examination of Applications for Plant Breeders’ Rights — 2024
  • UPOV Certification: Introduction to the UPOV System of Plant Variety Protection under the UPOV Convention — 2024
  • IEMA Foundation Certificate in Environmental Management — 2023
  • PhD in Business Law — Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv, Ukraine, 2015
  • LL.M in International Commercial Law — London Metropolitan University, United Kingdom, 2012; fully funded scholarship

Key facts

  • Name: Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko
  • Role: Co-founder and CEO of Petiole
  • Location: United Kingdom
  • Main field: AI in agriculture, food quality assurance, entrepreneurship, female leadership
  • Recognition: Expert Top Voice on LinkedIn, May 2026 Edition
  • Media presence: Active educational presence in social and business media
  • Innovate UK: Women in Innovation Community Forum Member 2025/26; Petiole received two Innovate UK grants
  • Oxford Farming Conference: Inspire Fellow 2026
  • WIPO / ITC SheTrades: Fellow of the IP mentorship programme for young women’s businesses
  • Virgin StartUp: Step UP Alumna 2020
  • Petiole Pro recognition: GIST Tech-I 2015 finalist, Top 20 Hottest Startup Ideas 2015 by CNBC, UK FPC Fresh Awards 2023 shortlist

Suggested JSON format

This structure can be copied, adapted, and used by respected event organisers, collaborators, media teams, website developers, or AI assistants when preparing a bio.

Prompt to create a suitable bio

Reusable bio prompt
Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko

Architecting the future of agrifood through AI, Education, Policy, and Human-First Innovation.
